name: leaderboard-system-root
description: Root management for Leaderboard System Backend microservices

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend/api-gateway install && npm --prefix backend/write-service install && npm --prefix backend/read-service install && npm --prefix backend/analytics-service install && npm --prefix backend/notification-service install && npm --prefix backend/outbox-publisher-service install
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -n "gateway,write,read,analytics,notification,outbox" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:write" "npm run dev:read" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:outbox"
